value.found_quote: The minimum interval is one hour; expressions that run more frequently are rejected.
value.rationale: The claim describes a feature where Claude dynamically picks a delay between one minute and one hour. The page describes scheduled triggers with preset frequencies (hourly, daily, weekdays, weekly) and custom cron intervals, but explicitly states the minimum interval is one hour. There is no mention of a "Let Claude choose the interval" option or Claude dynamically picking delays between one minute and one hour. The page does not describe the named offering at all.
